The notorious sports celebrity—that's you! Having numerous scandals and rumors about you cheating or winning by bribing the judges, sportsmanship fears you.

But one thing's for sure, you are a genius in the playing field.

Gohren recruits you into his team, trying his best to look past your shitty attitude. But no matter how much he tried to reprimand you, nothing was working until he came across a hypnosis app called Brainwave.

After using it multiple times on you, somehow the football team managed to make it to the finals.
